dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8647 IH: Representative Green’s Original Legislation to increase from 9 to 13 the number of justices of the Supreme Court.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Green of Texas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: Representative Green’s Original Legislation to increase from 9 to 13 the number of justices of the Supreme Court.

section.text: Section 1 of title 28, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking eight and inserting twelve; and
by striking six and inserting eight.
